name: Pattern Scout
description: Detects patterns across model responses: consensus areas, divergence points, recurring pharmaceutical themes, and rubric trend analysis. Calculates rank spread to measure inter-model agreement, performs keyword-frequency theme detection across 15 pharma-specific categories, and analyses rubric score distributions to identify strongest and weakest evaluation criteria.

provider.organization: Bayer AG — LLM Council Agent Team

skills.name: Consensus Detection
skills.description: Analyses aggregate rankings to determine model consensus. Rank spread <1.0 = strong consensus; >2.5 = significant divergence. Identifies top-ranked model with average position and review count.
examples: Determine how much models agree on the best response about tafamidis efficacy

skills.name: Pharmaceutical Theme Detection
skills.description: Keyword-frequency analysis across 15 pharma categories: mechanism of action, pharmacokinetics, pharmacodynamics, clinical trial, safety profile, efficacy, bioavailability, half-life, dosing, metabolism, side effect, adverse, regulation, approval, indication.

skills.name: Rubric Trend Analysis
skills.description: Analyses Stage 2 rubric scores across all criteria and responses. Identifies strongest and weakest evaluation dimensions with aggregate percentages to guide quality improvement.
